steps.title: Identify compound growth
steps.content:
The value increases by $2\%$ of the previous year's value, so this is exponential growth. The growth factor is
$$1+0.02=1.02$$

steps.title: Build the value function
steps.content:
Start with the purchase value $180$ and multiply by $1.02$ once for each year $t$.
$$V(t)=180(1.02)^t$$
The answer is C.
